title: Hello from the generated 01mvp-blog-starter site
excerpt: This post was created by the 01mvp-blog Skill during site initialization.
contentMarkdown:
# Hello from the generated 01mvp-blog-starter site

The 01mvp-blog Skill provisioned Cloudflare resources, deployed the Worker, wrote site settings, and published this bilingual post through the API.
